blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,794 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 31".
